message:
fix(tmux): add default timeout to CapturePaneOutput to prevent hangs

Wrap context.Background() with context.WithTimeout using
DefaultCommandTimeout in the convenience CapturePaneOutput method.
Previously, CapturePaneOutput could block indefinitely if tmux became
unresponsive; now it inherits the same timeout protection as other
tmux client operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
